languages.text:
The Pet immediately restores 100% Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP. It also triggers an additional effect that depends on the Pet.
Mastiff R-VR: Until the end of combat, all attacks of the Mastiff deal damage equal to (Pet's WS Bonus)% maxWounds of the target.
🦅Cyber-Eagle: The Obstructed enemy's attacks through the Eagle are considered auto-crit if hitting other enemies.
Servoskull Swarm: The Overseer's allies benefit from the Scried status applied to the enemies.
🐓Psyber-Raven: The Overseer can redirect attacking Psyker abilities through the Relaying Raven.
